members.name: GetGlobalEndPosition
members.summary: Returns the [member end_position] that is relative to the link as a global position.

members.name: GetGlobalStartPosition
members.summary: Returns the [member start_position] that is relative to the link as a global position.

members.name: GetNavigationLayerValue
members.summary: Returns whether or not the specified layer of the [member navigation_layers] bitmask is enabled, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: GetNavigationMap
members.summary: Returns the current navigation map [RID] used by this link.

members.name: GetRid
members.summary: Returns the [RID] of this link on the [NavigationServer2D].

members.name: SetGlobalEndPosition
members.summary: Sets the [member end_position] that is relative to the link from a global [param position].

members.name: SetGlobalStartPosition
members.summary: Sets the [member start_position] that is relative to the link from a global [param position].

members.name: SetNavigationLayerValue
members.signature: public void SetNavigationLayerValue(int layerNumber, bool value)
members.summary: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified layer in the [member navigation_layers] bitmask, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: SetNavigationMap
members.summary: Sets the [RID] of the navigation map this link should use. By default the link will automatically join the [World2D] default navigation map so this function is only required to override the default map.

members.name: Bidirectional
members.summary: Whether this link can be traveled in both directions or only from [member start_position] to [member end_position].

members.name: Enabled
members.summary: Whether this link is currently active. If [code]false[/code], [method NavigationServer2D.map_get_path] will ignore this link.

members.name: EndPosition
members.summary: Ending position of the link. This position will search out the nearest polygon in the navigation mesh to attach to. The distance the link will search is controlled by [method NavigationServer2D.map_set_link_connection_radius].

members.name: EnterCost
members.summary: When pathfinding enters this link from another regions navigation mesh the [member enter_cost] value is added to the path distance for determining the shortest path.

members.name: NavigationLayers
members.summary: A bitfield determining all navigation layers the link belongs to. These navigation layers will be checked when requesting a path with [method NavigationServer2D.map_get_path].

members.name: StartPosition
members.summary: Starting position of the link. This position will search out the nearest polygon in the navigation mesh to attach to. The distance the link will search is controlled by [method NavigationServer2D.map_set_link_connection_radius].

members.name: TravelCost
members.summary: When pathfinding moves along the link the traveled distance is multiplied with [member travel_cost] for determining the shortest path.
